networks.name: Geodnet
networks.topFinding: **7 exact (lat,lng) duplicate groups** on 19,576 public stations — each row in §1 is one coordinate pair your registry team can grep today.
networks.verificationCall: Sample station IDs that share an exact coordinate pair in §1 and run POST /api/verify-device on each operator's Proof of Origin to confirm whether they resolve to distinct, real device identities.

networks.name: WeatherXM
networks.topFinding: **287 cells** exceed designed capacity — §1 lists H3 indices + map centers for your ops queue.
networks.verificationCall: For operators in the over-capacity H3 cells in §1, run POST /api/verify-device to attest active, signed device presence over time and compare against the public cell tally.

networks.name: Hivemapper
networks.publicSource: Solana mainnet HONEY SPL mint (public RPC)
networks.topFinding: **49.10% of UI-reported HONEY** sits in the **top 20 visible SPL accounts** (Solana RPC cap) — economic *shape* for treasury/MM review, not a contributor GPS read.
networks.reason: On-chain holder/economic shape — NOT a device-level claim. verify-device cannot link holders to operators; monitor only.

networks.name: Natix Network
networks.publicSource: Natix Coverage Map metrics feed (coverage.natix.network/coverage/v1/metrics) + Solana NATIX SPL mint
networks.reason: No qualifying headline finding extracted from report yet.

networks.name: DIMO
networks.topFinding: **Of 158,119 DIMO vehicle identities, 40,622 (25.7%) are backed by physical hardware**; 31,399 (19.9%) connect via software/synthetic devices, and 86,098 (54.5%) show no connected device on the public registry.
networks.reason: More on-chain identities than connected/active devices on the public registry — a composition gap observed at aggregate level. Bounded reality-check with the operator first (expected pre-onboarding/churn vs counted-but-unbacked identities?) before any device test.
networks.clarificationRequest: Sanity-check (not a test request): the public Identity API shows more vehicle identities than connected devices. Ask whether the unbacked identities are expected (pre-onboarding, churn, deregistered) or whether they count as active for rewards. verify-device only becomes relevant if confirmation establishes real per-device activity to ground-truth.

networks.name: Helium IoT
networks.topFinding: **4,859 single-coordinate stacks of ≥10 hotspots** on 1,008,070 located units — the largest stack holds **502 hotspots on one coordinate** (§1 lists keys your registry team can grep today).
networks.verificationCall: Sample hotspot keys from the largest same-coordinate stacks in §1 and run POST /api/verify-device to confirm whether stacked asserted locations resolve to distinct, physically separate radios.

networks.name: Helium Mobile
networks.topFinding: **530 single-coordinate stacks of ≥10 hotspots** on 54,726 located units — the largest stack holds **497 hotspots on one coordinate** (§1 lists keys your registry team can grep today).
networks.verificationCall: Sample hotspot keys from the largest same-coordinate stacks in §1 and run POST /api/verify-device to confirm whether stacked asserted locations resolve to distinct, physically separate radios.
